# Time Tracker Documentation

> Official docs for the "Time Tracker" browser extension.

Time Tracker is a browser extension that helps users track web usage time, analyze browsing habits, and set limits.
This site contains installation steps, usage guides, data migration docs, and privacy information.

## Primary Entry Points

- Home (English): /en/
- Install (English): /en/install
- Guide Start (English): /en/guide/start
- Privacy (English): /en/privacy

## Language Entry Points

- English: /en/
- Simplified Chinese: /zh_CN/
- Traditional Chinese: /zh_TW/
- German: /de/
- French: /fr/
- Spanish: /es/
- Portuguese (Portugal): /pt_PT/
- Japanese: /ja/
- Russian: /ru/

## Product & Source Links

- Extension source repository: https://github.com/sheepzh/timer
- Documentation repository: https://github.com/sheepzh/timer-page
- Issue tracker: https://github.com/sheepzh/timer/issues

## Data & Privacy

- Privacy policy is available under each locale path, e.g. /en/privacy.
- This documentation site does not require user account sign-in.
